title: Resizable images, resizable text, and rotation via Free Transform tool

requirements.text: Uploaded images placed on the attack path canvas must be resizable. When an image element is selected, display 8 drag handles (corners and edge midpoints) that allow the user to resize the image by dragging. The image dimensions must update in real time during the drag and the aspect ratio should optionally be constrained (e.g., holding Shift).

quotes: the uploaded image should be resizable in the diagram

acceptanceCriteria: Selecting an uploaded image on the canvas shows 8 resize handles around it.
Dragging a corner or edge handle resizes the image element.
The image visually updates during the drag operation.
Resize state is persisted as part of the diagram element (width/height).

requirements.text: Text elements added via the 'Add Text' toolbar button must be resizable. When a text element is selected, display 8 drag handles that allow the user to resize the text box. The text should wrap within the resized box and the element dimensions must be stored in state.

quotes: the add text function I should be able to resize

acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a text element on the canvas shows 8 resize handles around the text box.
Dragging a handle resizes the text box in real time.
Text wraps within the new dimensions of the text box.
Width and height are stored on the TextLabel element in useAttackPathState.

requirements.text: The Free Transform tool must support rotating both text elements and uploaded image elements on the attack path canvas. When the Free Transform tool is active and an element (text or image) is selected, display a rotation handle (e.g., above the bounding box) that the user can drag to rotate the element around its center. The rotation angle must be stored in element state and applied as a CSS/SVG transform.

quotes: the free transform tool should able to rotate the text in the diagram

acceptanceCriteria: With the Free Transform tool active, selecting a text or image element shows a rotation handle.
Dragging the rotation handle rotates the element around its center in real time.
Rotation angle is stored on the element in useAttackPathState (TextLabel and Image types).
The rotated transform is correctly applied via CSS transform or SVG transform attribute.
Rotation is preserved when the diagram is saved and reloaded.

constraints: All canvas interaction logic must remain in frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas.tsx and frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Backend schema changes are only permitted if element state (width, height, rotation) cannot be serialized within the existing DiagramState types.
nonGoals: Rotation of icon/connector elements (only text and uploaded image elements are in scope).
Locking aspect ratio by default (only when Shift is held).
Adding new toolbar buttons beyond what already exists.
